item.title: Neo-Nazi, Klan 'Cyclops' and ‘Sadistic’ biker: Here's who SPLC paid in its informant network
item.description: A sprawling federal indictment accuses the Southern Poverty Law Center of using millions in donor funds to covertly pay informants linked to white sup...

item.title: Mike Minogue heads to Mass GOP convention ready to take on Maura Healey: 'She's bankrupting our state'
item.description: Mike Minogue, GOP gubernatorial candidate in Massachusetts, brings military and business executive experience as he challenges incumbent Maura Healey

item.title: House Republican would '100%' leave the GOP if red state changed primary rules
item.description: Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, a moderate Republican in a purple Pennsylvania district, says he'd leave the GOP if the state conducted open primary elections...

item.title: How mutiny at Southern Poverty Law Center triggered leadership collapse
item.description: The Justice Department has accused the SPLC of infiltrating extremist groups with paid informants, adding to years of leadership upheaval at the nonpr...

item.title: Trump DOJ jumps into Musk xAI court battle as diversity fight heats up
item.description: The DOJ backs Elon Musk's xAI lawsuit alleging Colorado's AI law forces developers to adopt DEI standards, violating the First and 14th amendments.
